narrative:
Sharon Twp township has 5,413 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.8 percentage points.
